title: microseris leiosperma
intro: Microseris leiosperma, also known as the Smooth-rayed microseris, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been known to provide health benefits, including the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Microseris leiosperma can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be used as a tea or applied topically as a poultice.
